Tests if converting `Infinity` to a string results in "Infinity".

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `String` function when applied to the `Infinity` value in JavaScript. It uses an `assert` statement to check that converting `Infinity` to a string results in the string "Infinity". This test ensures that the JavaScript environment correctly handles the conversion of the special numeric value `Infinity` to its string representation. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific conversion behavior.
